caption: A man with a unique high-top hairstyle, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, and a red bow tie, is seated in a recording studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and various pieces of clothing on hangers. Red and white logos are overlaid on the scene, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly to the left. He is captured mid-speech, with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth position as he speaks. The camera remains static, and there are no other people visible in the frame.
